zh.lifeSummary: 當Humphrey Wheelock於1513年出生在英國史洛普爾多林頓時，他的父親Sir Hugh de Willicke63歲，母親Mary de Spellman30歲。他於1560年與Margaret Winter在英國史洛普爾多林頓結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1595年3月11日在他的家鄉享年82歲，埋葬在英國史洛普爾多林頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Humphrey Wheelock于1513年出生在英国史洛普爾多林頓时，他的父亲Sir Hugh de Willicke63岁，母亲Mary de Spellman30岁。他于1560年与Margaret Winter在英国史洛普爾多林頓结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1595年3月11日在他的家乡享年82岁，埋葬在英国史洛普爾多林頓。

nameMeanings.name: Wheelock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Worcestershire and Staffordshire): habitational name from a place so named in Cheshire. The placename is derived from the river Wheelock; the river name means ‘winding river’, from British Suilāco-.

nameMeanings.name: Humphrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman name, Hunfrid, of Germanic origin, derived from hun ‘bear-cub, warrior’ + fred, frid ‘peace’. The Norman form absorbed the native Old English form, Hunfrith, which existed in England before the Conquest. The spelling with -ph- reflects classicizing influence. Since the 16th century it has enjoyed a modest popularity in England, having been borne most notably by the youngest son of King Henry IV , the Duke of Gloucester ( 1391–1447 ), known as ‘Duke Humphrey’. He was noted as a patron of literature, and founded what became the Bodleian Library at Oxford. In modern times, probably the most famous bearer has been the film star Humphrey Bogart ( 1899–1957 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Humphrey Wheelock was born in 1513, in Dorrington, Shropshire, England, his father, Sir Hugh de Willicke, was 63 and his mother, Mary de Spellman, was 30. He married Margaret Winter in 1560, in Dorrington, Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 11 March 1595, in his hometown, at the age of 82, and was buried in Dorrington, Shropshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Humphrey Wheelock est né en 1513, à Dorrington, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Hugh de Willicke, avait 63 ans et sa mère, Mary de Spellman, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Winter en 1560, à Dorrington, Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 11 mars 1595, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 82 ans, et a été enterré à Dorrington, Shropshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Humphrey Wheelock 1513 in Dorrington, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Hugh de Willicke 63 und seine Mutter Mary de Spellman 30. Er hat 1560 in Dorrington, Shropshire, England Margaret Winter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 11. März 1595 im Alter von 82 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Dorrington, Shropshire, England begraben.

Lui sposato Margaret Winter nel 1560, nel Dorrington, Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Humphrey Wheelockが1513年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアドーリントンで生まれた時，父Sir Hugh de Willickeは63歳，母Mary de Spellmanは30歳であった。1560年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアドーリントンでMargaret Winterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1595年3月11日に故郷で82歳で死去し，イギリスシュロプシュアイアドーリントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Humphrey Wheelock(이)가 1513년 영국 슈럽실르 도링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Hugh de Willicke(은)는 63세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary de Spellman(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1560년 영국 슈럽실르 도링턴에서 Margaret Winter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1595년 3월 11일 그의 고향에서 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 슈럽실르 도링턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Humphrey Wheelock nasceu em 1513, em Dorrington, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Hugh de Willicke, tinha 63 anos e sua mãe, Mary de Spellman, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Winter em 1560, em Dorrington, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 11 de março de 1595, em sua cidade natal, com 82 anos, e foi sepultado em Dorrington, Shropshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Humphrey Wheelock родился в 1513 г. в местности доррингтон, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Hugh de Willicke было 63 года, а матери, которую звали Mary de Spellman, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Winter в 1560 г. в местности доррингтон, шропшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 11 марта 1595 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 82 лет и был похоронен в местности доррингтон, шропшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Humphrey Wheelock nació en 1513, en Dorrington, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Hugh de Willicke, tenía 63 años y su mamá, Mary de Spellman, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Margaret Winter en 1560, en Dorrington, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 11 de marzo de 1595, en su pueblo, a la edad de 82 años, y fue sepultado en Dorrington, Shropshire, Inglaterra.
